name: audit-architecture-split
title: Architecture split for oversized app and Tauri modules
description: Split the oversized React App shell and Rust Tauri command aggregate into maintainable feature modules without changing user-facing behavior.
creator: xuning
notes: First split pass landed in commit 14aa0b0: App.tsx delegates to AppImpl, lib.rs delegates to lib_impl, Rust command clusters moved into domain modules, and AppImpl/lib_impl are both under 2,000 lines. Work continues on remaining oversized orchestration files without behavior changes.
